examples: Aunt Polly paused, perplexed, and Tom looked for healing pity.
Never was a company of people so perplexed, so interested, and so stupefied, before.
They were perplexed by her response.
They were left perplexed when Young announced he'd had enough of watching his body deteriorate.
And I'm still perplexed when people don't share my passion for money, efficiency and numbers.
